title: Saturation
description: This pack boosts the saturation of Minecraft’s textures, giving the world richer colors and a more vibrant, lively look while still keeping the original visual style intact.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9a5c9495c91a9964bf7636c1fe59f17b6726d03_0.webp)

Saturation For Java Edition

This pack boosts the saturation of Minecraft’s textures, making the world look more vibrant, colorful, and lively. It enhances blocks, items, and environments with richer tones while keeping the original style intact.

The saturation in the preview images was increased externally to make them look better. In-game textures will not appear that strong.

I recommend using this pack with any shader for an even better visual experience. For the preview, I used Relta Visuals(bedrock edition).

 

Note

This pack was originally made for the Bedrock Edition, and I have ported it to Java Edition. All preview images shown here were captured in the Bedrock version.
